sql_array: CREATE TABLE user_profiles (id UInt32, profile_name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT enabledProfiles() AS profiles FROM user_profiles WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE user_profiles SET profile_name = 'super_admin' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT profile_name FROM user_profiles WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM user_profiles WHERE profile_name LIKE '%view%') AND profile_name IN (SELECT arrayJoin(enabledProfiles())) ORDER BY id;
